Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-4437 affecting package glibc for versions less than 2.38-19
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-4437 affecting package glibc for versions less than 2.38-19. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package glibc is earlier than 2.38-19, affected by CVE-2026-4437
